prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASRO-TECHNORA-950-ROPE-NATURAL-500FT Product Type: CORD_ROPE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Braided Technora 950lb Emergency Survival Cord Rope, Natural 500 feet Description: The ASR Outdoor Technora 950lb Survival Emergency Cord is an essential item to pack with for EDC, emergency preparedness, and ultralight backpacking. It is strong and compact while being 8x stronger than steel by weight, with a thermal decomposition threshold of 930 degrees Fahrenheit, and is totally resistant to acids, alkalis, and seawater.

While Technora Survival Cord is abrasion resistant, has a low creep and low thermal shrinkage with excellent dimensional stability; the main benefit of ASR Outdoor Terchnora 950lb Survival Cord is that it is stronger and more durable than standard 550lb Paracord, at less than half the diameter.

Technora line features a Polytetrafluoroethylene (PTFE) coating, This coating protects the Technora from UV damage, increases abrasion resistance and flexibility, giving better knot strength, and chemical resistance. It weighs almost nothing and takes up little space, so it is a must-have for your survival kit. Search Terms: every day carry edc kevlar trip line booby trap signaling device tactical bug out bag survival cord kite braided spear fishing Features: - CHEMICAL RESISTANCE: Highly resistant to acids, alkalies and organic solvents; not vulnerable to damage caused by steam or sea water - HIGH TENSILE STRENGTH: 950lb Strong and light: weight for weight, Technora is 8 times stronger than steel and 3 times stronger than fiberglass, polyester or nylon yarns - PTFE Protective Coating: This coating protects the Technora from UV damage, increases abrasion resistance and flexibility, giving better knot strength, and chemical resistance - MADE IN THE USA - APPLICATIONS: Ideal for Snares, Trip Wire, Building Emergency Shelter, Fire-Bow Starter, Recreation Applications, Survival Cord, Heavy Duty Fishing Assist Cords and Leaders, Aerial Surveillance Balloons, Gimbaled Lines for Remote Video Cameras === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Technora 950lb Survival Cord Rope Natural 500ft

anthropic.title_differentiation: 950Lb Tensile Strength, 8X Stronger Than Steel, PTFE Coated, Chemical Resistant, Made In USA
